prompt: A single client's page: their document checklist with per-document status, who on our staff is assigned, and the latest messages between us and them.
wire:
export default function ClientPickerShell() { const [clients, setClients] = React.useState([]); const [clientId, setClientId] = React.useState(""); const [client, setClient] = React.useState(null); const [docs, setDocs] = React.useState([]); const [messages, setMessages] = React.useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = React.useState(false); const [msgBody, setMsgBody] = React.useState(""); const [sendPhase, setSendPhase] = React.useState("idle"); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = React.useState("docs"); React.useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClients({}).then((r) => { setClients(r.data || []); if (r.data && r.data.length > 0) { setClientId(r.data[0].id); } }); }, []); React.useEffect(() => { if (!clientId) return; setLoading(true); Promise.all([ tools.host_getClient({ id: clientId }), tools.host_listClientDocuments({ id: clientId }), tools.host_listClientMessages({ id: clientId }), ]).then(([c, d, m]) => { setClient(c); setDocs(d.data || []); setMessages(m.data || []); setLoading(false); }); }, [clientId]); const sendMessage = async () => { if (!msgBody.trim()) return; setSendPhase("sending"); const result = await tools.host_sendClientMessage({ id: clientId, body: { body: msgBody, author: "firm" }, }); setSendPhase(result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "sent"); if (result && result.status !== "pending-approval") { setMsgBody(""); setSendPhase("idle"); tools.host_listClientMessages({ id: clientId }).then((m) => setMessages(m.data || [])); } }; const statusMeta = (s) => { const map = { missing: { label: "Missing", color: "#B0473A", bg: "#fdf2f1" }, received: { label: "Received", color: "#7c6f3e", bg: "#fdf8ec" }, needs_review: { label: "Needs review", color: "#7c6f3e", bg: "#fdf8ec" }, verified: { label: "Verified", color: "#2d6a4f", bg: "#edf7f2" }, rejected: { label: "Rejected", color: "#B0473A", bg: "#fdf2f1" }, }; return map[s] || { label: s, color: "#46443f", bg: "#f3f2ef" }; }; const progressReceived = docs.filter((d) => d.status === "verified" || d.status === "received").length; const progressVerified = docs.filter((d) => d.status === "verified").length; const total = docs.length; const containerStyle = { fontFamily: "var(--vendo-font-family)", color: "var(--vendo-color-text)", background: "var(--vendo-color-background)", minHeight: "100vh", padding: "0 0 40px 0", }; const surfaceStyle = { background: "var(--vendo-color-surface)", border: "1px solid var(--vendo-color-border)", borderRadius: "var(--vendo-radius-medium)", padding: "20px 24px", }; const labelStyle = { fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: 600, letterSpacing: "0.06em", textTransform: "uppercase", color: "var(--vendo-color-muted)", marginBottom: 4, }; const pill = (s) => { const m = statusMeta(s); return ( {m.label} ); }; if (!clientId && clients.length === 0) { return (
